Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

(1 comment)

I think this is a reasonable compromise. The OI Scrub code is using the new flag, and the only other "reasonable" place for an EA inode to appear might be lost+found, because of e2fsck. While it is still possible some random inode is corrupted with this flag, this would be extremely unlikely, and not worthwhile to worry about.
Uploaded patch set 2.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

This breaks building on Ubuntu and SUSE. Please include them as well.
Removed Code-Review-1 by James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>

Patch Set 2:

James

The agreement about having the other patch series in the tree would be that the maintainers of those patch series would have the responsibility to keep them up to date not the developers pushing fixes for the primary supported kernel (RHEL 9.4 at present). By all means have a follow-on patch to keep the other patch series in sync but please do not delay us from landing fixes for the primary kernel by giving such patches a -1!

Thanks

Peter
Patch Set 2: Code-Review+2

parents.subject: LU-18095 sec: fix ACL handling on recent kernels

commit.subject: LU-18195 osd-ldiskfs: use IGET_NO_CHECKS for objects under lost+found
commit.message:
LU-18195 osd-ldiskfs: use IGET_NO_CHECKS for objects under lost+found

With e2fsck older than v1.47.1-rc2-10-g849a9e6e1,
e2fsck could link ea inode under lost+found, and this
creates problems on kernels enforce ea_inode flag checks.

Check for lost+found fid and use NO_CHECKS flag
in the lfsck code path.

Add s_lpf_ino in sbi, and set it by find the lost+found
entry during ext4_fill_super().
In ext4_lookup, check if the parent is the lost+found dir.
Note lost+found won't be changed when target mounted as
lustre, so we only lookup once during mount and don't
monitor lost+found entry. Even if it's changed duing e2fsck
or mounted as ldiskfs, we could still detect at next mount.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: fstype=ldiskfs serverdistro=el9.4 testlist=conf-sanity env=ONLY=61b
Change-Id: I95492fcc2f0ec4188dfb92b1dc1aa6055cab6ca8
Signed-off-by: Li Dongyang <dongyangli@ddn.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/56276
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Li Xi <lixi@ddn.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
